data.body: Review findings (2 Opus agents + OSS-gotchas research) resolved, and multi-provider config landed: the [agents] extra now ships Claude + ChatGPT, provider chosen per run via REBAR_LLM_MODEL/_MODEL_PROVIDER/_BASE_URL. Validated in-session that the full agent assembles for both ChatAnthropic and ChatOpenAI (commits 7db1008, prior (llm) commits).
